---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new cognitive capability or a deeper PRD coverage item
title: "[feature] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What cognitive question can NeuroPit not answer today.

## Proposal

Plain language description of the new capability.

## PRD mapping

Which PRD section does this map to. If none, explain why this is still in scope for the Cognitive Twin Operating System framing.

## Positioning check

- [ ] This proposal deepens the Cognitive Twin. It does not turn the system into a telemetry analytics dashboard, a strategy copilot, or a generic AI racing assistant.

## Design sketch

If applicable, the equation, the topic, or the API contract you have in mind.

## Open questions

What you want feedback on before code lands.
